title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets after years of regulatory battles and legal action against government overseers. The startup grew from zero revenue in its first four years to a $22 billion valuation, scaling 100x in four weeks after regulatory approval.
